params.name: Twin Flower
params.description: A princess was locked away for loving the enemy prince. Years later, he conquered her kingdom but his army wanted her dead. They fled by ship, but a storm struck. The prince woke on shore—alone. The princess' body lay beside him, cold. Heartbroken, he held her and died. Where their bodies rested, twin flowers grew. Always apart, until their last breath together.
